feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: way to archive the company code after deactivation?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are using sap public cloud 2sl system as we have deactivated the company code can we archive the company coe how can the process will be ...?

entry.title: RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY BAdI in s4hana public cloud
entry.content:
I want to create RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY BAdI via custom logic app in s4hana public cloud.

But I can't find that BAdI in custom logic. Why? Is there any configuration setting I need to activate?

Best Regards,

Khaing ZIn

entry.title: How to remove batch management from product master in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear all,

my users made a mistake and created batches for several products, now there is stock, material movements, purchase orders and production orders for these materials and batches become relevant without need.

That is why we want to delete the batch information again.

The batch management setting can not be reversed anymore for the affected products, but creating new products is no option due to released and approved drawings with these product numbers.

In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition there is no SE16N that could help us with this. What is the way in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to reverse this setting ?

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Dirk

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud Adobe Forms: How to Control Line Item Layout Using a Header Flag?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on an SAP Adobe Form in S/4HANA Public Cloud. A custom header-level flag field is sent from ABAP and correctly bound to a header field, and the value prints correctly in the PDF output. This flag is used in JavaScript (calculate event) on a repeating line-item subform to control line-item layout behaviour such as visibility or page breaks, based on the current line-item index. The script is placed on a subform.

The logic works correctly in Adobe LiveCycle Designer (ADLC) preview, but after uploading the form and executing it in SAP runtime via transaction code, the conditions do not work. The flag value is available and prints correctly, no JavaScript errors occur, but the line-item layout changes are ignored.

What is the correct SAP-supported way to control line-item layout based on a header-level flag in Adobe Forms in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Missing Credit Memo to Add Journal Entry Item in Dispute Case
entry.content:
Cannot add credit memo to the dispute case.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: email setting for billing form
entry.content:
Hi, In my current project am struck in setting emails in OPD. Requirement is if i_customer-Taxnumber4 = 0., then we should send email the billing form to customer, otherwise no need to send them email. How to achieve this in Public cloud?

I was going through one document, came across below C_BILLINGDOCUMENTOMPARAMDET

which is not released in public cloud. Any inputs on how can we add this condition in OPD or if we have any other way around to achieve this?

Thanks.

Regards,

JP

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: CDs view for the HSN number
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Based upon client requirement we are building custom report where we required CDS view to fetch data of the HSN Number.

 

Please let us know CDs view to fetch HSN number data


Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Credit Memo Request to correct Debit Memo
entry.content:
We are using Debit Memo Request DR with subsequent Debit Memo L2. We now want to raise a credit note against the L2 Debit Memo/Invoice issues to customer. But there is no Credit Memo Request available, which allows to reference the L2 Document. 

How to resolve this problem?

Best Regards 

Johannes

entry.title: Business role changes after upgrade in SAP Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently updating business roles following the SAP Cloud ERP upgrade. Regarding a specific business role, "Upgrade Changes" is set to "Yes" in the D system, while it remains "No" in the T and P systems. The change involves "Business Catalogs Supporting IAM Apps." Is it possible for such a discrepancy to occur between the D system and the other environments?

Best Regards,
Saki

entry.title: Production Order printing on Pick list
entry.content:
Hi,

Requirement: Production order has to be printed on picklist while doing Staging. We are following scope id 3DV and Doc type for Outbound delivery for this process is DOG1. Currently this seems to be unavailable on picklist, If it is possible then please suggest the process .

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: No Option to choose Item Category "U" - Stock Transfer and "L" - Subcontracting in "My Purchase Requ
entry.content: No Option to choose Item Category "U" - Stock Transfer and "L" - Subcontracting in "My Purchase Requisition" App

entry.title: BOM Should Not Create For Boughtout Material Currently no restriction in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4 HANA system allow to create BOM for Boughtout Material but we do not want to create BOM form Boughtout Material.

How can we restrict the same in SAP S/4 hana Public cloud.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Error ' Essential transfer parameters are missing in record: "
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While performing the Staging process for a production order, I am using "stage material for production order" app. However, I am encountering the following error.(SAP Public cloud)

Could you please help me understand the cause of this issue and guide me on how to resolve it?

Thank you.
Kiran

entry.title: How to download Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation result or Output Spools in bulk ?
entry.content:
Dear SAP 

When SAP Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation job is run, it generates lots of reports as spool , we need the spool to be downloaded as is required by auditor for FX calculation verification which spool has the data but after the run it generates 100s of output report which is impossible to download every month.

Request you support for way to get the spool data over email or downloaded in bulk in one single archive or a SAP report that provides the same information.

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pricing error: Mandatory condition TTX1 is missing
entry.content:
In my sales order, I get the error "Pricing error: Mandatory condition TTX1 is missing".

 

In my customer master data, I have maintained tax classification "0 - Tax Exempt"

 

In my product master data, I have maintained TTX1 Exempt in VATreturn (0):

 

Why am I still getting an error?

entry.title: Key User Extensibility Fields for Bill of Material not available in SAP BOM Migration template ?
entry.content:
We have created a custom field and published it and now it appears in the components details in the app Change Bill of Material but in the Migration Template for object Material BOM the created custom field is not showing

 

How to maintain custom fields in the Migration Cockpit for object BOM ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Standard App/Report for Weekly Production
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We are using S/4HANA Public Cloud and looking a standard way to get a Weekly Production Report.

Ideally, the report should show:
Work Center
Material Produced
Quantity Produced
Date Produced

Is there a specific Fiori App/Report that provides this data in a weekly view? 

Any recommendations on the standard app for this?

Thanks

entry.title: Manual Rework activity appearing in production Manage Your Solution
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

After the 2602 upgrade, we noticed that a Manual Rework activity is appearing in the Manage Your Solution app in the Production system, but it is not visible in the Quality/Test system.

When we click on Action Required, it shows that certain master data needs to be set up. However, this master data has already been maintained in both the Q and P systems.

Could you please advise:

  1. Is any action required from our side, even though the master data is already maintained?
  2. Why is this Manual Rework activity appearing only in Production after the 2602 upgrade?

For reference, we have attached the relevant screenshot.

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

entry.title: How to schedule jobs to run every 30 minutes instead of every 3 hours with batch-based triggers
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support, 

 

In the Manage Situation Types - Extended Application, the selection for recurrence interval for batch based job scheduling is currently only 3, 6, 12, 24 hours, but we require the interval time of 30 minutes. 

Can this 'Repeat Interval' of 30 minutes be chosen. 

 

Thank you. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: NOT ABLE TO POST NVOICE
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

we are unable to billing document as it shows no journal entry.
